nasb.text: Then the captain went along with the officers and proceeded to bring them back without violence (for they were afraid of the people, that they might be stoned).

esv.text: Then the captain with the officers went and brought them, but not by force, for they were afraid of being stoned by the people.

cnv.text: 於是守衛長和差役去帶使徒來，不過沒有用暴力，因為怕眾民用石頭打他們。

ccb.text: 圣殿护卫长和差役再去把使徒抓回来。这次他们不敢动粗，生怕百姓会用石头打他们。

csbs.text: 于是守卫长与差役们一起去把使徒们带来，并没有用暴力，因为怕民众用石头砸他们。
